description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their handbags are creatively engineered to cater to the woman of today. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leatherette clutch. With classy stitch detailing, this bag in glossy black makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas one roomy compartment with a magnetic button closure and an inner zipped compartmentOne long removable chain strap for carrying easeCrystal embellishments on the front and brand name embossed on a small placard looped through the chain strapMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 15 cmWidth: 29 cmDepth: 6 cm
